# Judge Chronos

> Privacy-first automatic time tracking for macOS

## Overview

Judge Chronos is an open-source, privacy-focused time-tracking application built exclusively for macOS. It automatically tracks app usage, website time, and meeting duration to help users understand and optimize their productivity.

## Core Features

- **Automatic Time Tracking**: Records app usage, documents, and websites without manual timers
- **Hierarchical Projects**: Organize time into nested project structures
- **AI-Powered Categorization**: Apple Intelligence suggests categories for activities
- **Productivity Scoring**: Rate projects and track productivity trends over time
- **Browser Extensions**: Chrome/Safari extensions for accurate website tracking
- **Invoice-Ready Reports**: PDF/XLSX export for timesheets and billing
- **Post-Call Prompts**: Automatically detect video calls and prompt for time logging
- **Privacy First**: All data stays local on your device

## Architecture

```
Judge Chronos/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ SwiftUI Native App (macOS 15+)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Local SQLite Storage
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Apple Intelligence Integration
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Browser Extension Support (Chrome/Safari)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Dual Distribution: App Store + Direct
```

## Data Models

### Core Entities

- **Session**: A time entry with start/end, app, window title, project/category
- **Project**: Hierarchical organization with productivity ratings
- **Category**: Simple tags for grouping activities
- **Rule**: Automation rules for categorization
- **FocusSession**: Pomodoro-style focus timers

### Key Features

- Immutable raw events (never modified)
- Derived sessions allow logical edits
- Full audit trail of rule applications
- JSON export for data portability

## API Overview

### LocalDataStore (Main Data Access)

```swift
// Project Management
func addProject(_ project: Project)
func moveProject(_ projectId: UUID, toParent: UUID?)
func projectHierarchy() -> [ProjectNode]

// Session Management  
func addSession(_ session: Session)
func events(from: Date, to: Date) -> [ActivityEvent]

// Reporting
func totalTime(for projectId: UUID) -> TimeInterval
func projectName(for projectId: UUID?) -> String
```

### ProductivityEngine

```swift
func calculateDailyScore(for: Date) -> ProductivityScore
func calculateTrend(for: DateInterval) -> ProductivityTrend
func suggestImprovements() -> [String]
```

### Report Generation

```swift
PDFReportGenerator.generateReport(config: ReportConfiguration)
XLSXReportGenerator.generateReport(config: ReportConfiguration)
```

## Browser Extension Protocol

### Native Messaging

Extensions communicate via native messaging on port `com.berkerceylan.judgechronos.browser`.

**Message Format:**
```json
{
  "type": "URL_ACTIVE",
  "browser": "chrome",
  "url": "https://github.com/user/repo",
  "domain": "github.com", 
  "title": "User/Repo - GitHub",
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:00:00Z"
}
```

### Message Types

- `URL_ACTIVE` - User is viewing this URL
- `URL_INACTIVE` - Tab hidden
- `BROWSER_BLUR` - Window lost focus
- `TAB_CLOSED` - Tab was closed

## Configuration

### App Settings

Key user preferences stored in `UserPreferences`:

- `workDayStart` / `workDayEnd`: Working hours
- `privateModeEnabled`: Pause tracking
- `reviewReminderEnabled`: Daily review notifications
- `weeklyRecapEnabled`: Weekly summary

### Project Settings

Each `Project` supports:

- `productivityRating`: Very Distracting (-2) to Very Productive (+2)
- `hourlyRate`: For invoicing
- `isBillable`: Include in billable reports
- `parentId`: For hierarchy

## File Locations

- **App Data**: `~/Library/Application Support/JudgeChronos/`
- **Local JSON**: `local_data.json`
- **SQLite**: `activity.sqlite3`
- **Exports**: User-selected directory

## Build & Distribution

### Targets

- `Judge Chronos`: Direct distribution (Full Disk Access)
- `Judge Chronos MAS`: Mac App Store (Sandboxed)

### Key Differences

| Feature | Direct | MAS |
|---------|--------|-----|
| Full Disk Access | вң… | вқҢ |
| KnowledgeC.db | вң… | вқҢ |
| App Sandbox | вқҢ | вң… |
